scripts.build: vite build && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.jsx --outDir dist-ssr && node scripts/ssg.js
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --local --file=migrations/0001_rate_limits.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --local --file=migrations/0002_reviews.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --local --file=migrations/0003_soft_delete.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --local --file=migrations/0004_pedidos.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --local --file=migrations/0005_cupones.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --local --file=migrations/0006_suscriptores.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_rate_limits.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_reviews.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --remote --file=migrations/0003_soft_delete.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --remote --file=migrations/0004_pedidos.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --remote --file=migrations/0005_cupones.sql && wrangler d1 execute intima-exclusive-db --remote --file=migrations/0006_suscriptores.sql
